description_long: This is a rectangular bench with a plush, upholstered seat in a deep burgundy or maroon color, supported by four slender, straight wooden legs. The seat appears to be cushioned, providing comfort for sitting, and the upholstery has a matte, slightly textured finish. The legs are a light wood tone, contrasting with the darker seat, and are evenly spaced at the corners for stability. The bench lacks both a backrest and armrests, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. Its proportions suggest it is designed for multiple people to sit side by side, making it suitable for waiting areas, lobbies, or public spaces. The overall construction appears sturdy yet lightweight enough to be moved if needed.
description: A modern, rectangular bench with a cushioned burgundy seat and four straight wooden legs, lacking backrest and armrests. The design is minimalist and suitable for versatile urban settings.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow profile of the cushioned seat and two visible wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bench, the plush seat, and all four wooden legs.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, highlighting the bench's depth and two legs.
description_view_3: Full side view mirroring view 1, showing the entire seat surface and all four legs.
